heading: Applicability of Bretton Woods Agreements Act
label: 290k–5 Applicability of Bretton Woods Agreements Act
text: The provisions of shall apply with respect to the Agency to the same extent as with respect to the Bank and the International Monetary Fund.section 286b of this title
notes: References in TextThe Bretton Woods Agreements Act, referred to in section catchline, is , , which is classified principally to subchapter XV (§ 286 et seq.) of this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.act July 31, 1945, ch. 33959 Stat. 512section 286 of this title
CodificationSection is based on section 408 of title IV of H.R. 3750, One Hundredth Congress, as introduced , and enacted into law by .Dec. 11, 1987Pub. L. 100–202

Amendments1989— struck out at end “Reports with respect to the Agency under paragraphs (5) and (6) of shall be included in the reports made thereunder after the United States accepts membership in the Agency.”Pub. L. 101–240section 286b(b) of this title
